title: Self-Improvement
learningObjectives: Explain the autoresearch keep rule (delta > 0.1 composite score) and describe how the Karpathy-style loop proposes, tests, and discards synthesis instruction changes.
Parse a runs.jsonl entry and identify which fields map to SFT training examples, DPO preference pairs, and reward model data.
Describe the Nanda 8-move annotated abstract framework and explain why QLoRA fine-tuning on domain-annotated data produces a better annotator than a general-purpose model.
Trace the literature review pipeline from arXiv fetch through Semantic Scholar enrichment, 5-persona curation, annotation, and Jinja2 template rendering.
Identify the three self-improvement mechanisms in the harness (autoresearch, fine-tuning, literature synthesis) and explain how they compound over time.

labs.title: Building a DPO Dataset from Run Logs
